data.content: Approved in implementation_review. Reviewed commit 04d2eb4e in /private/tmp/foolery-a71f. buildLeaderboard now filters leaderboard rows to agents with at least 10 completed attempts and success rate strictly greater than 25% before ranking, and computes mean margin and totalN from that qualified set only, so weak-signal entries cannot influence displayed output. Steps with no qualified agents are omitted. Regression coverage in src/components/__tests__/lease-audit-view-helpers.test.ts covers low-signal exclusion from ranking and aggregate fields, <10 attempts, <=25% success rate, tie-break ordering among qualified agents, and all-filtered omission. Validation rerun in the worktree: bun run vitest src/components/__tests__/lease-audit-view-helpers.test.ts, bun run lint (passes with one pre-existing react-hooks/incompatible-library warning in src/components/beat-form.tsx), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build.
